Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm sorry. I should have been able to navigate better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_002_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You did great for your first time.

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I agree. I'm convinced that you're the one we need on support.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I didn't do anything. It was all you, Yukari-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That special attack sure was cool though, Yuka-tan! How'd you do it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 10 25 25}I just focused really hard and thought to myself, I have to do whatever it takes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}And while I was thinking that, I kind of felt something surging inside me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}The chairman did say the cartridge would synchronize with our emotions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Right. Although, I'm still not entirely sure how it works.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}From what I could tell, it reacted to Yukari-chan's strong emotions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}So this weapon gives the user strength beyond their limits when their emotions are heightened?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}But basically, if we're fired up enough, we can really pop off, right!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}And thanks to you, Yukari-chan, we have a good idea of how it works.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}From now on, I should be able to tell when someone can use theirs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 10 25 25}I just got lucky. I don't know much more than anyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 9 25 25}Actually, I'm pretty fired up right now. Maybe I can already cook one up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}U-Um, actually I think it's too dangerous to use here, Junpei-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'll do more research into how the syncing with emotions works later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Everyone has different feelings when they're fighting, so the timing on when they can use these will probably be different too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'd like to give it a go myself, but we should call it a day for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}We can't overwork {f 4 1}, and we've got some time until the next full moon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'm a little worried about the change with the floors though. What if something like that happens again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Yes, if something has changed in the tower, we'll need to be extra careful when exploring from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}In any case, we may have had some problems, but we learned a lot today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Not only did we get to test our new lineup and equipment, but we also got to see that we're all improving at a remarkable pace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Aww, Kirijo-senpai! Quit buttering me up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Just leave everything to Junpei Iori, the soon-to-be MVP![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Maybe I shouldn't be the one to say this, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}You literally didn't do anything today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All allies can now use Theurgy.[n]{f 1 1}
